evals.prompt: I'm setting up a new domain for cold outbound. What do I need to do?
evals.expected_output: Complete domain setup guide covering authentication, warmup, and sending configuration

assertions.name: domain_auth
assertions.description: Covers SPF, DKIM, and DMARC setup with example DNS records

assertions.name: warmup_schedule
assertions.description: Provides a week-by-week warmup schedule for the new domain

assertions.name: separate_domain
assertions.description: Recommends using a dedicated outbound domain separate from the primary company domain

evals.prompt: My open rates dropped from 45% to 15%. I'm using 3 Apollo mailboxes at 50 emails/day each.
evals.expected_output: Deliverability diagnosis framework with specific steps for Apollo and reputation recovery

assertions.name: diagnosis
assertions.description: Provides a diagnosis framework — check blacklists, verify auth, review bounce rate, check sender reputation

assertions.name: reputation_check
assertions.description: Recommends checking each mailbox's reputation individually and using Google Postmaster Tools or MXToolbox

assertions.name: volume_adjustment
assertions.description: Suggests reducing daily volume and re-warming affected mailboxes

evals.prompt: We're switching from Apollo to Mailshake. What deliverability setup do we need?
evals.expected_output: Platform migration checklist covering auth updates, warmup, and both platforms' settings

assertions.name: both_platforms
assertions.description: Covers configuration for both Apollo (what to keep/remove) and Mailshake (what to add)

assertions.name: auth_verification
assertions.description: Recommends updating SPF to include Mailshake and adding Mailshake-specific DKIM

assertions.name: warmup_needed
assertions.description: Advises warmup even for established mailboxes when connecting to a new platform
